changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.comment: Prevent overlapping active bookings at the database level
changeSet.sql: CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS btree_gist
ALTER TABLE booking.bookings ADD CONSTRAINT booking_no_overlapping_confirmed EXCLUDE USING gist (tsrange(start_time, end_time, '[)') WITH &&) WHERE (status IN ('CONFIRMED', 'PENDING'))

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE booking.bookings DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS booking_no_overlapping_confirmed
